suppressedMessages.message:
Error: Cannot call impure function during render

`Date.now` is an impure function. Calling an impure function can produce unstable results that update unpredictably when the component happens to re-render. (https://react.dev/reference/rules/components-and-hooks-must-be-pure#components-and-hooks-must-be-idempotent).

  102 |
  103 |         // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/purity
> 104 |         const uniqueNoteId = Date.now();
      |                              ^^^^^^^^^^ Cannot call impure function
  105 |         const newNote = {
  106 |             id: uniqueNoteId,
  107 |             text: summary,

messages.message: React Hook useMemo has a missing dependency: 'startOfMonth'. Either include it or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [deals, startOfMonth]

messages.message: React Hook useMemo has a missing dependency: 'now'. Either include it or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [deals, now]
